---
title: "Projects"
---

# Projects

Here are some projects that reflect my experience in analytics, data science, and research.

:::{.card-container}

:::{.project-card}
## Pricing Analytics — House of Blues San Diego

**Tools:** Python, APIs (Ticketmaster, Spotify), Kaggle

- Collected and analyzed event and artist data to identify pricing and demand patterns
- Built a regression model to estimate ticket prices based on popularity and timing
- Developed a pricing strategy that could generate ~$100K revenue and ~$44K profit

:::

:::{.project-card}
## Social Media Analytics

**Tools:** R, Statistical Modeling

- Cleaned and analyzed social media data to evaluate user engagement trends
- Built regression models and performed hypothesis testing
- Identified key drivers of user behavior and presented insights through visual reports

:::

:::{.project-card}
## Research — UCSD Cognitive Development Lab

**Tools:** Data Processing, Behavioral Analysis

- Conducted behavioral experiments using eye-tracking and auditory datasets
- Cleaned and structured large datasets for analysis
- Presented findings to research teams to support experimental design decisions

:::

:::

## Skills

- **Programming:** Python, SQL, R, Java, JavaScript, MATLAB :contentReference[oaicite:0]{index=0}
- **Tools:** Tableau, Power BI, Google Analytics, Excel :contentReference[oaicite:1]{index=1}
- **Techniques:** Regression, A/B Testing, Data Cleaning, ETL :contentReference[oaicite:2]{index=2}

## What I’m Currently Working On

- Improving my data analysis and modeling skills
- Exploring applications of analytics in sports and business
- Building projects that combine technical and strategic thinking
